member.name: M:GTA.World.CreateRandomPed(GTA.Math.Vector3,System.Single,System.Func{GTA.Model,System.Boolean})
member.summary:
Spawns a
of a random
at the position specified.
member.param:
The position to spawn the
at.

The method that determines whether a model should be considered when choosing a random model for the
. If
is set, gangster and animal models will not be chosen, just like CREATE_PED does.
